---
title: "Walter Vincent Wilberforce Moor"
---

## Walter Vincent Wilberforce Moor

**Dates:** (1859-12 Feb 1869)

### Description

third son of the Rev. John Frewen Moor, jr.

### Biography

He died of diphtheria at Twyford school [<i>Erminois</i>; 1861 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
